footer.description: The fluid architect for e-commerce financial intelligence. Build your empire on solid data.

hero.description: The high-end architect for your e-commerce financial health. Centralize orders, inventory, and logistics in one fluid experience.

features.title: Precision Features
features.subtitle: Designed for scale, architected for simplicity.
features.orderBody: Track each order from purchase through confirmation and final delivery with less manual follow-up.
features.financeBody: Monitor cash flow, margins, and spending from one view built for daily decision-making.
features.storesBody: Launch and manage multiple stores from one workspace without losing operational clarity.
features.carriersBody: Integrate delivery companies into your process so order handoff and tracking stay smooth.
features.staffBody: Add employees, assign tasks, and define permissions with clear control over who does what.
features.stockBody: Watch inventory levels, catch low-stock products early, and keep every item organized.
features.pixelBody: Connect ad pixels across your stores for automatic tracking and stronger campaign feedback.
features.analyticsBody: Use sharper reporting to measure growth, review performance, and move with confidence.
features.recoveryBody: Win back abandoned demand and detect duplicate or suspicious orders before they drain effort.

workflow.step1Body: Link your online store, warehouse, and delivery partners in minutes. No technical skills required.
workflow.step2Body: See all your orders, stock, and shipments in one clear dashboard. Know exactly what is happening in real-time.
workflow.step3Body: Use clear reports to cut shipping costs and restock at the right time. Stop guessing, start growing.

radar.title: Stop Money Leaks
radar.description: Our system automatically tracks your orders, shipping costs, and returns to uncover hidden losses. Keep more of the money you earn.
radar.point2: See which products are actually losing you money

bento.carriersDescription: Connect and compare rates from Yalidine, ZR Express, and others instantly.
bento.profitDescription: Stop looking at revenue. Start looking at what you actually keep.

audience.title: Built for merchants at every stage.
audience.subtitle: Whether you are starting small or operating at scale, the platform stays practical and clear.
audience.segment1Body: For merchants launching their first store and needing one clean place to manage daily operations.
audience.segment2Body: For teams that need clearer roles, smoother order handling, and more control as volume increases.
audience.segment3Body: For merchants running multiple stores and warehouses without wanting separate tools for each one.
audience.segment4Body: For businesses handling large order flow and looking to protect margins while scaling with confidence.

beforeAfter.title: See the difference in daily operations.
beforeAfter.subtitle: The value is not abstract. It changes how the business runs every day.
beforeAfter.before1: Orders, stock, and delivery updates are scattered across too many places.
beforeAfter.before2: You can see sales, but not your real net profit after costs and returns.
beforeAfter.before3: Daily operations depend on manual follow-up, spreadsheets, and guesswork.
beforeAfter.after1: Orders, inventory, carriers, and finances live in one operational view.
beforeAfter.after2: You know what you are actually earning and where money is leaking.
beforeAfter.after3: Your team works faster with clearer workflows, fewer mistakes, and better decisions.

pricing.subtitle: Clear pricing built for merchants at every stage of growth.

pricing.basicFeature3: Manage all your orders from one screen
pricing.basicFeature4: Stock alerts to avoid running out of products

pricing.ultraFeature3: Custom API integration for your company systems

faq.a1: Yes. You can move up as your operations grow without losing your existing data.

hero.description: Arba7i exists to give merchants a cleaner and more confident way to run daily operations.

mission.title: Why Arba7i exists
mission.body: Commerce teams should not need scattered tools and constant manual follow-up to stay in control.

values.title: The principles behind the product
values.subtitle: The product direction is grounded in clarity, discipline, and usefulness.
values.item1Body: Clear product logic, clear pricing, and clear data visibility for merchants.
values.item2Body: We focus on solving real operational friction instead of adding noise.
values.item3Body: Every decision starts with the daily realities of sellers and their teams.
values.item4Body: The interface should feel calm, intentional, and dependable under pressure.

philosophy.title: The fluid architect
philosophy.body1: We build structured systems that still feel flexible in the way real teams work.
philosophy.body2: As operations grow, the interface should help you stay calm instead of making the business harder to see.

team.title: Built by people who care about operations
team.description: The product is shaped around the daily friction of merchants, warehouse teams, and order operations.

finalCta.title: Build with a clearer operating system

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Direct answers to the questions merchants usually ask when getting started or scaling operations.
faq.q1: How do I set up my store for the first time?
faq.a1: Create your workspace, add your store details, and connect delivery partners before processing your first orders.
faq.q2: Can I change my plan later?
faq.a2: Yes. You can upgrade when your operation grows or adjust your billing cycle from your account settings.
faq.q3: Where can I manage team access?
faq.a3: Team members, permissions, and access roles are managed from the administration area inside your workspace.
faq.a4: Use live chat, email support, or the contact page depending on the urgency and type of request.

support.title: Still need help? Talk to our team.
support.description: If the answer is not in the help center, reach out directly and we will point you to the right next step.

finalCta.title: Ready to move faster with better support?
finalCta.description: Start with a clearer operating system and keep direct help close when your business needs it.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: Learn how Arba7i collects, uses, protects, and manages data across the platform.

toc.title: Contents
toc.note: Looking for the legal service terms instead?

sections.section1Body1: We collect the information you provide directly when creating an account, contacting us, or using core platform workflows.
sections.section1Body2: This can include business contact details, operational activity, and technical usage information needed to run the service reliably.
sections.section2Body1: We use collected information to provide the platform, secure accounts, improve operational workflows, and support merchants effectively.
sections.section2Body2: We do not use merchant operational data to build advertising profiles or sell behavioral data to third parties.
sections.section3Quote: We do not sell your personal or operational data.
sections.section3Body1: We only share data with service providers, legal authorities where required, or trusted partners needed to operate the service under appropriate safeguards.
sections.section4Body1: We use technical and organizational safeguards designed to protect account data, operational records, and access to administrative systems.
sections.section4Card1Body: Sensitive data is protected in transit and stored using secure infrastructure practices.
sections.section4Card2Body: We monitor critical systems and restrict privileged access to authorized workflows.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.description: Depending on applicable law, you may request access, correction, deletion, or export of your personal data.
rights.item1Body: Request a copy of the personal data associated with your account.
rights.item2Body: Update inaccurate or incomplete information held about your business.
rights.item3Body: Request deletion of your account and associated personal data where applicable.
rights.item4Body: Ask for an export of your data in a structured and usable format.

contact.title: Privacy inquiries
contact.description: If you have questions about this policy or how data is handled, contact our team directly.

hero.title: Terms and Conditions
hero.description: Please read these terms carefully before using the Arba7i platform to manage business operations.

toc.title: Navigation
toc.cardBody: Our team can help explain how these terms apply to your use of the platform.

sections.section1Body1: These terms govern access to and use of the Arba7i platform, including associated web interfaces and operational tools.
sections.section1Body2: References to the platform, user, and services should be interpreted in the context of Arba7i's merchant operations environment.
sections.section2Body1: You are responsible for maintaining accurate account information and protecting access credentials for your workspace.
sections.section2Body2: Unauthorized sharing of credentials or access abuse may result in suspension or termination of service.
sections.section2Note: We may request business verification information when needed to protect the platform and comply with legal obligations.
sections.section3Body1: Paid plans are billed according to the selected cycle. Taxes, payment provider conditions, and pricing changes may apply based on your region and plan.
sections.section3Point1: Fees are billed in advance according to your selected plan.
sections.section3Point2: Plan pricing may change with reasonable prior notice.
sections.section3Point3: Renewal continues until cancellation under the applicable billing policy.
sections.section4Body1: The Arba7i service, design system, software, and brand assets remain the property of Arba7i and its licensors.
sections.section4Body2: Your business data remains yours. Our software, interfaces, and supporting materials remain ours.
sections.section4Quote: Your data stays yours. The platform stays ours. The value comes from how they work together.
sections.section5Body1: We may suspend or terminate access if these terms are breached or if continued access creates legal or operational risk.
sections.section5Body2: You may stop using the service or cancel your account through the available account management process.
sections.section6Body1: The service is provided on an ongoing best-effort basis. Availability may be affected by maintenance, third-party dependencies, or force majeure events.
sections.section6Body2: Merchants remain responsible for business decisions, legal compliance, and operational outcomes derived from their own use of the platform.

finalCta.title: Have questions about these terms?
finalCta.description: Reach out if you need help understanding responsibilities, billing terms, or account policies.
